components.name: ojdbc11
components.description: Oracle JDBC Driver compatible with JDK11, JDK12, JDK13, JDK14 and JDK15

license.name: Oracle Free Use Terms and Conditions (FUTC)

components.name: commons-net
components.description: Apache Commons Net library contains a collection of network utilities and protocol implementations. Supported protocols include: Echo, Finger, FTP, NNTP, NTP, POP3(S), SMTP(S), Telnet, Whois.

components.name: jaxb-impl
components.description: Old JAXB Runtime module. Contains sources required for runtime processing.

components.name: jaxb-core
components.description: Old JAXB Core module. Contains sources required by XJC, JXC and Runtime modules with dependencies.

components.name: ha-api
components.description: Eclipse Enterprise for Java (EE4J) is an open source initiative to create standard APIs, implementations of those APIs, and technology compatibility kits for Java runtimes that enable development, deployment, and management of server-side and cloud-native applications.

components.name: streambuffer
components.description: Stream based representation for XML infoset

components.name: mimepull
components.description: Provides a streaming API to access attachments parts in a MIME message.

components.name: FastInfoset
components.description: Open Source implementation of the Fast Infoset Standard for Binary XML (http://www.itu.int/ITU-T/asn1/).

components.name: saaj-impl
components.description: Implementation of Jakarta SOAP with Attachments Specification

components.name: woodstox-core
components.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

components.name: stax2-api
components.description: Stax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.

components.name: jakarta.xml.soap-api
components.description: Provides the API for creating and building SOAP messages.
